# Avela Travel

> The Avela Experience team: luxury travel focused exclusively on Nosara, Costa Rica. Handpicked villas, private chefs, surf sessions, ocean adventures, and complete trip planning.

## About

Avela Travel is the Avela Experience team: a full-service luxury travel operation in Nosara, Costa Rica, one of the world's five Blue Zones. We curate the entire Nosara experience for families and groups: villa selection, private chefs, surf lessons, ocean adventures, jungle tours, transport, and wellness.

Every recommendation we make is vetted by our local team and aligned with giving guests the best possible trip.

## Villas

Signature properties:
- **Villa Ocaso** · 4 bedrooms, sleeps 10. Jungle setting. Floor-to-ceiling glass, private pool, natural wood finishes.
- **Villa Zenith** · 5 bedrooms, sleeps 12. Ocean-view hilltop. Panoramic Pacific views, stone and wood architecture, chef kitchen, outdoor BBQ terrace.

Curated collection:
- **Calla Lily** · 5 BR / 4.5 BA, sleeps 10. Las Huacas hills above Playa Guiones. Saltwater pool, heated jacuzzi, ocean view, national reserve setting. https://avela.travel/villas/calla-lily
- **Casa Vivo** · 5 BR / 4 BA, sleeps 10. Hilltop between Playa Guiones and Playa Pelada. Pool, gym, sauna, cold plunge, elevator. https://avela.travel/villas/casa-vivo
- **Raintree Casa** · 6 BR / 7 BA, sleeps 14. Studio Saxe design, featured in Architectural Digest. Saltwater infinity pool, solar powered. https://avela.travel/villas/raintree
- **Rubio Azul** · 4 BR / 4 BA, sleeps 10. Guiones Norte. Pool, jacuzzi, private gym, movie theater. 5-minute walk to Playa Guiones. https://avela.travel/villas/rubio-azul
- **Stella Maris** · 4 BR / 6 BA, sleeps 8. Huacas de Nosara hills. Multi-level contemporary, private pool, floor-to-ceiling glass. https://avela.travel/villas/stella-maris
- **Villa Aravis** · 5 BR / 5.5 BA, sleeps 10. Las Huacas hills. Brutalist architecture, ocean view from every king bedroom. https://avela.travel/villas/villa-aravis
- **SEN** · 4 BR / 4 BA, sleeps 8. Pelada Beach. Contemporary sanctuary with curved hardwood roof, private skate bowl, sauna, cold plunge, yoga shala, fitness deck. https://avela.travel/villas/sen
- **Tres Hermanas** · 5 BR / 5 BA, sleeps 16. North Playa Guiones. 25-meter lap pool, dedicated yoga facility, four king masters plus bunk room, solar powered. https://avela.travel/villas/tres-hermanas
- **Casa Oceanus** · 5 BR / 5 BA, sleeps 12. Guiones Beach Club. Mediterranean courtyard with saltwater pool, standalone casita, private path to Playa Guiones. https://avela.travel/villas/casa-oceanus
- **Terrace House** · 4 BR / 4 BA, sleeps 10. South Playa Guiones. Studio Saxe bioclimatic design, pool blended into jungle canopy, four bicycles included. https://avela.travel/villas/terrace-house
- **Casa Almendra** · 5 BR / 4 BA, sleeps 10. South Playa Guiones, K Section. Infinity-pool courtyard, yoga deck, private chef included, solar powered. https://avela.travel/villas/almendra
- **Calma House** · 4 BR / 4.5 BA, sleeps 14. North Playa Guiones. Brand-new build, heated pool, fire pit, Italian linens, Sonos system, backup generator. https://avela.travel/villas/calma-house

## Services

1. Luxury villas (handpicked, locally vetted)
2. Private chefs (farm-to-table, Costa Rican + international)
3. Surf sessions (Playa Guiones, all levels)
4. Ocean adventures (Monkey Head Adventures, 2 private boats, snorkeling, fishing, sunset cruises)
5. Jungle adventures (ATV, waterfalls, wildlife, canopy)
6. Transport (airport transfers from SJO/LIR, 4x4 rentals, private drivers)
7. Wellness (in-villa spa, yoga, sound healing, Blue Zone retreats)

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://avela.travel/) · Two client paths: independent booking vs full Avela Experience
- [Villas](https://avela.travel/villas) · Villa Ocaso and Villa Zenith detail pages
- [About](https://avela.travel/about) · Blue Zone story, Monkey Head Adventures partnership
- [Contact](https://avela.travel/contact) · Inquiry form and WhatsApp link

## Location

Nosara, Nicoya Peninsula, Costa Rica. One of five Blue Zones worldwide.
